message:
feat(fwc): add fuzzy matching for operation discovery with edit-distance budgeting

Enhance the search scoring engine with Levenshtein-distance-based fuzzy
matching for operation IDs and aliases, improving recovery when users
misspell operation names.

Add identifier_has_fuzzy_match() and fuzzy_term_matches() functions
that compare query terms against operation identifiers and aliases
with configurable edit-distance budgets. The budget is derived from
token length via fuzzy_distance_budget(): zero tolerance for short
tokens (<4 chars) to avoid false positives, scaling up to 2 edits
for longer identifiers.

Fuzzy matches receive WEIGHT_OP_ID_FUZZY = 6 scoring weight, lower
than exact matches but high enough to surface likely intended results
when no exact match exists. Cache lowercased aliases during scoring
to avoid redundant allocations.

Includes 6 new tests covering fuzzy typo recovery ("guthib" → "github"),
identifier segment matching, alias typo handling, and budget boundary
conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
